subject: [Important Notice] GPU Delivery Delay Notice
body: Dear Customer: Due to HBM supply tightness and export control approval delays, the 50 units of H200 (PO-2026-0315) are expected to be delayed from the original delivery date of April 15, 2026 to July 30, 2026, a delay of approximately 15 weeks. If you have urgent needs, we can offer Huawei Ascend 910C as an alternative, which is currently in stock with approximately 3-week lead time. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused.

subject: Vendor Annual Evaluation - Chip Vendor Risk Rating
body: Based on the annual evaluation, chip vendor risk ratings are as follows: NVIDIA (High Risk -> High Risk): export controls significantly impact supply continuity; AMD (High Risk): supply has been affected; Huawei (Medium Risk -> Low Risk): domestic supply chain is stable and improving; Intel (Medium Risk): supply has been affected. Recommendation: adjust procurement allocation to NVIDIA 60%, Huawei 25%, Intel 15%. Expected additional GPU procurement budget of 20M CNY.
